concepts.title: Equation of chord with a given mid-point
concepts.conceptBody:
Chord with a given mid-point 

The equation of chord of the hyperbola $\frac{{{x}^{2}}}{{{a}^{2}}}-\frac{{{y}^{2}}}{{{b}^{2}}}=1$ with $P\left( {{x}_{1}},{{y}_{1}} \right)$ as its middle point is given by $\mathbf{T}={{\mathbf{S}}_{1}}$ where $\text{T}\equiv \frac{\text{x}{{\text{x}}_{1}}}{{{\text{a}}^{2}}}-\frac{\text{y}{{\text{y}}_{1}}}{\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }{{\text{b}}^{2}}}-1$ and ${{\text{S}}_{1}}\equiv \frac{\text{x}_{1}^{2}}{{{\text{a}}^{2}}}-\frac{\text{y}_{1}^{2}}{\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }{{\text{b}}^{2}}}-1$

examples.title: What will be equation of that chord of hyperbola $25 x^2-16 y^2=400$, whose mid point is $(5,3)$
